document_info.title: Adobe India Hackathon 2025 - Challenge 1a Sample Document
document_info.author: Test Author
document_info.subject: PDF Processing Challenge

sections.heading: Executive Summary
sections.content: This document demonstrates the capabilities of the PDF processing solution developed for the Adobe India Hackathon 2025 Challenge 1a. The solution extracts structured data from PDF documents and generates comprehensive JSON outputs.

sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content: The PDF processing challenge requires extracting meaningful structure from documents while maintaining performance constraints. This solution uses PyMuPDF for fast text extraction and implements intelligent structure analysis.

subsections.heading: Problem Statement
subsections.content: Process PDF documents to extract structured information including headings, paragraphs, tables, lists, and figures.

subsections.heading: Solution Approach
subsections.content: Our approach combines high-performance text extraction with intelligent document structure analysis to meet the challenge requirements.

sections.heading: Technical Implementation
sections.content: The solution is built using Python with PyMuPDF for PDF processing, implementing multi-threaded processing for optimal performance.

subsections.heading: Architecture
subsections.content: The system consists of modular components: TextExtractor, StructureAnalyzer, and PDFProcessor.

subsections.heading: Performance Optimization
subsections.content: Multi-threading, memory-efficient processing, and optimized algorithms ensure sub-10-second processing for 50-page documents.

sections.heading: Results and Validation
sections.content: The solution successfully meets all challenge requirements including execution time, memory usage, and output format compliance.

sections.heading: Conclusion
sections.content: This PDF processing solution demonstrates high-performance document analysis capabilities while maintaining strict resource constraints and producing structured, schema-compliant outputs.

paragraphs.text: The Adobe India Hackathon 2025 Challenge 1a focuses on developing a high-performance PDF processing solution that can extract structured data from complex documents.
Our solution leverages the power of PyMuPDF (fitz) library for fast and reliable text extraction, combined with intelligent document structure analysis algorithms.

The system is designed to process documents efficiently while staying within the specified constraints: execution time ≤ 10 seconds for 50-page PDFs, memory usage ≤ 16GB, and no internet access during runtime.
Key features include automatic section detection, table extraction, list identification, and figure caption recognition.
The solution has been thoroughly tested and validated to ensure compliance with all challenge requirements and optimal performance across various document types.

items: Load PDF document and extract metadata
Extract text blocks with formatting information
Analyze document structure and identify hierarchy
